name: kbuddhiai-infra
description: kBuddhi AI — AWS CDK infrastructure (Option C, minimised cost)

scripts.deploy:all: npm run build && cdk deploy --all --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:main: npm run build && cdk deploy KbuddhiStack --require-approval never --context certArn=arn:aws:acm:us-east-1:699092321120:certificate/f70fcda3-09ec-4c4e-bb9e-ac3720cb69b4
scripts.deploy:cert: npm run build && cdk deploy KbuddhiCertStack --require-approval never
